Stipulated Injunction And Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jerry Threet of the Office of the City Attorney, 554-3914, appearing for plaintiff and moving party
Clifford Yat Jung, defendant appearing in propria persona

The Court reviewed the stipulation, and admonished Mr. Jung regarding the terms of the injunction and judgment. Mr. Jung stated that he did understand each of the terms of the agreement. The Court signed the stipulated injunction and stipulated judgment in open Court. (301/DEW) JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR# 2737
